comment.value: https://blog.system11.org which is for EPM7064 PLCC84 variant
Initial drawing based on Dataman PLCC84 Adapter V1.0 from
Optional pads for Capacitors on power rails.
Added JTAG, Power and Breakout/Jumper Pin Headers

comp.description: Generic connector, double row, 02x05, odd/even pin numbering scheme (row 1 odd numbers, row 2 even numbers), script generated (kicad-library-utils/schlib/autogen/connector/)

fields.field: TSW - Samtec 2.54mm Pin Header 10.92mm Overall Pin Length (07) - Fast Stock
